title: Du Jian
content:
Du Jian
 is a member of the Red division of the 
Heavenly Fate Sect
 on 
Planet Tian Yun
.

Background
[
]

In the past, he saw 
All-Seer
 devour 
Sun Yun
 through a mountain goblin. After he entered the Heavenly Fate Sect, he cultivated a technique that could absorb spiritual energy from beasts. he was in the back mountains when he found a mountain goblin that was nearing the end of its life. As he was absorbing its spiritual energy, he extracted some of its memories.

History
[
]

He entered Tide Abyss inside the 
East Demon Spirit Sea
 along with 
Wang Lin
, 
Murong Zhuo
, 
Zhao Yixuan
 and Xu Fei (of the 
Corpse Sect
). He attempted to guide Wang Lin into a trap but pushed into the trap by Wang Lin and ended up with just a weak origin soul.

Afterwards, Wang Lin refined him into a Celestial Guard using 
Qing Lin
's technique. He offered him freedom after he worked for 1000 years. Alas, Du Jian self-exploded himself in a battle against 
Blood Ancestor
 to allow Wang Lin to escape.

Appearence Ep 128
